products.title: Inventory
products.description: Your catalog, stock levels, and reorder thresholds.
products.createDescription: Create a product with pricing, stock, variants, and images.
products.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, SKU, or barcode...
products.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?

images.remainingSlots: You can only add {count} more image(s)
images.uploadPrompt: Drag and drop images here, or click to browse
images.empty: No images uploaded yet. The first image will be used as the primary product image.

variants.limitWarning: Warning: Current options would create {count} variants, exceeding the limit of {max}. Please reduce the number of option values.
variants.emptyHint: Add options like Size or Color to create product variants

create.title: Create Product
create.productTypeHint: Kits bundle components for sale. Assemblies require work orders to produce.
create.trackingHint: Choose how to track individual units of this product.
create.purchasePriceHint: What you paid for this item
create.packagingCostHint: Material portion of the per-SKU packing cost.
create.packingLaborCostHint: Packing cost equals packaging material plus packing labor.
create.lastMileCostHint: US delivery or fulfillment cost for one sold SKU.
create.sellableSkuHint: Show this SKU in TikTok US weekly sales and operating reports.
create.sellingPriceHint: What you sell this item for
create.minStockHint: Alert when stock falls below this level
create.reorderPointHint: Stock level that triggers automatic reorder
create.reorderQuantityHint: Quantity to order when stock reaches reorder point
create.variantHint: Add options like Size or Color to sell different versions of this product. Each combination creates a variant with its own price and stock.
create.variantStockHint: Stock is tracked per variant when variants are enabled.

show.title: Product Details
show.variantStockTracked: Stock is tracked per variant. Total variant stock
show.availableKitStock: Available kit stock (limited by lowest component)
show.noComponentsHint: Click Add Component to build the bill of materials.

orders.title: Orders
orders.searchPlaceholder: Search by order number, customer name or email...

create.title: Create Order
create.noItemsAdded: No items added yet. Select a product above to add it to the order.

show.deleteWarning: Deleting this order will restore the inventory stock for all items.
show.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete order #{number}?
show.stockRestored: The inventory stock for all items in this order will be restored.
show.confirmApprove: Are you sure you want to approve order #{number}?
show.confirmReject: Are you sure you want to reject order #{number}?

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase Orders
purchaseOrders.getStarted: Get started by creating a new purchase order.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, code, email, or contact...
suppliers.getStarted: Get started by adding a new supplier.

show.noProducts: No products linked to this supplier

customers.title: Customers
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, code, email, company, or contact...
customers.getStarted: Get started by adding a new customer.

locations.title: Warehouse Locations
locations.searchPlaceholder: Search locations by name or code...

inventoryValuation.title: Inventory Valuation
inventoryValuation.description: Total stock value, costs, and profit potential

stockMovement.title: Stock Movement
stockMovement.description: Track all stock adjustments and changes

salesAnalysis.title: Sales Analysis
salesAnalysis.description: Revenue, trends, and top selling products

lowStock.title: Low Stock Report
lowStock.noProductsBelowMin: No products are below minimum stock levels

categoryPerformance.title: Category Performance Report
categoryPerformance.addProductsHint: Add products to categories to see performance data

customReports.title: Custom Report Builder
customReports.description: Build custom reports with flexible columns, filters, and sorting

stockAdjustments.title: Stock Adjustments
stockAdjustments.subtitle: Track all stock changes and adjustments
stockAdjustments.searchPlaceholder: Search by product name or SKU...

create.title: Create Stock Adjustment
create.subtitle: Manually adjust product stock levels
create.adjustmentHint: Use positive numbers to increase stock (+10), negative to decrease stock (-5)
create.reasonPlaceholder: e.g., Damaged items, Inventory recount, Customer return
create.notesPlaceholder: Add any additional details about this adjustment...
create.negativeWarningMsg: This adjustment will result in negative stock. Please verify the quantity.

export.title: Export Products
export.subtitle: Download your inventory data
export.description: Export all your products to an Excel file. The export includes product details, pricing, stock levels, categories, and locations.

import.title: Import Products
import.subtitle: Upload inventory data in bulk
import.description: Import products from a CSV or Excel file. Download the template below to ensure your file has the correct format.
import.dragDrop: Drag and drop your file here, or
import.templateHelp: Need help? Download our template file with example data
import.noteUpdate: Existing products (matching SKU) will be updated
import.noteCreate: Categories and locations will be created if they don't exist
import.noteCurrency: Default currency is USD if not specified
import.noteSkip: Invalid rows will be skipped and reported

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.getStarted: Get started by uploading your first plugin above.

organization.title: Organization Settings
organization.userMgmtHint: User management functionality is available in the Users section.

account.title: Account Settings
account.description: Manage your profile, password, notifications, and preferences.
account.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive email notifications for important updates
account.lowStockAlertsDesc: Get notified when products are low in stock
account.orderNotificationsDesc: Receive notifications for new and updated orders
account.systemNotificationsDesc: Get notified about system updates and maintenance

email.title: Email Settings
email.configDescription: Configure how your organization sends email notifications.
email.adminOnly: Only organization admins can change these settings.
email.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep current password

notificationPreferences.title: Email Notification Preferences
notificationPreferences.description: Control which email notifications you receive. You'll still receive in-app notifications even if emails are disabled.
notificationPreferences.masterSwitch: Master switch for all email notifications. Disable this to stop receiving any emails.
notificationPreferences.lowStockDesc: Receive emails when products reach low stock or out of stock levels.
notificationPreferences.ordersDesc: Receive emails about order status changes and updates.
notificationPreferences.approvalsDesc: Receive emails when orders are approved or rejected.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.aboutDesc: Webhooks allow external services to receive real-time notifications when events occur in your organization.
webhooks.signedDesc: All webhook payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 for security verification.
webhooks.selectEvents: Select the events you want to receive notifications for.
webhooks.inactiveHint: (Inactive webhooks will not receive any deliveries)

show.title: Webhook Details
show.logsHint: Logs will appear here when events are triggered

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage users in your organization. You can add, edit, and remove users, as well as assign roles and permissions.
users.noUsersFound: No users found. Click "Add User" to create your first user.

create.title: Create User
create.roleHint: Base organizational role. Admins have access to all features.
create.additionalRolesHint: Assign custom roles with specific permission sets.

edit.title: Edit User
edit.newPassword: New Password (leave blank to keep current)
edit.passwordHint: Only fill this in if you want to change the user's password
edit.roleHint: The base role determines core access level. Admins have full access.
edit.customRolesHint: Assign custom roles created for your organization to grant specific permissions.

show.title: User Details
show.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.description: Manage roles and permissions for your organization. Create custom roles with specific permission sets to control access across the application.
roles.noRolesFound: No roles found. Click "Create Role" to define your first custom role.

create.title: Create Role
create.permissionSetsHint: Apply pre-configured permission sets to quickly assign common permission groups.
create.individualHint: Select additional permissions. You can click category names to select/deselect all permissions in that category.

edit.title: Edit Role
edit.systemHint: System role - name and description cannot be changed
edit.systemNameHint: System role names cannot be changed
edit.systemDescHint: System role descriptions cannot be changed
edit.permissionsHint: Customize the permissions for this role. Click category names to select/deselect all permissions in that category.

show.title: Role Details & Permissions
show.noUsersAssigned: No users assigned to this role yet.
show.systemRoleHint: This is a system role and cannot be modified or deleted.
show.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the {name} role? This action cannot be undone.

activityLog.title: Activity Log
activityLog.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your filters to see more results

update.title: System Update
update.newVersionReady: A new version is ready to install
update.backupNote: A backup will be created automatically before updating
update.latestVersion: You're running the latest version of the application
update.updatingApp: Updating application... This may take several minutes.
update.backupHint: Backups are created automatically before each update. You can also create manual backups here.
update.noBackups: No backups available. Click "Create Backup" to create your first backup.
update.autoBackup: A backup is automatically created before each update
update.maintenanceMode: The application will be in maintenance mode during updates
update.autoMigrations: Database migrations are run automatically during updates

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Forgot your password? No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will email you a password reset link that will allow you to choose a new one.

confirmPassword.title: Confirm Password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

verifyEmail.title: Email Verification
verifyEmail.description: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
verifyEmail.linkSent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

info.title: Profile Information
info.description: Update your account's profile information and email address.
info.name: Name
info.resendVerification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
info.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

password.title: Update Password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

welcome.title: Welcome to Inventoros
welcome.subtitle: Inventory Management for the Rest of Us
welcome.description: Thank you for choosing Inventoros! This installation wizard will guide you through the setup process.
welcome.step1Desc: Verify your server meets all requirements
welcome.step3Desc: Create your organization and admin user
welcome.step4Desc: Finalize installation and start using Inventoros
welcome.beforeBeginDesc: Make sure you have PHP 8.2+, MySQL/PostgreSQL, and the required PHP extensions installed.

requirements.title: System Requirements
requirements.subtitle: Checking your server configuration
requirements.allMetDesc: Your server meets all the requirements to run Inventoros.
requirements.notMetDesc: Please fix the issues below before continuing.

database.title: Database Configuration
database.subtitle: Configure your database connection
database.name: Database Name
database.dbExistsHint: Make sure your database exists before proceeding. The installer will create the necessary tables.

admin.title: Create Admin Account
admin.subtitle: Set up your organization and admin user
admin.orgNameHint: The name of your company or organization
admin.accessNote: This admin account will have full access to your Inventoros installation.

complete.title: Installation Complete!
complete.description: Inventoros has been successfully installed and configured.
complete.step1: Log in with your admin account
complete.step2: Set up your product categories and locations
complete.step3: Start adding products to your inventory
complete.step4: Invite team members to your organization

403.title: Access Denied - 403
403.heading: Access Denied
403.description: You do not have the required permissions to perform this action. If you believe this is an error, please contact your administrator.
403.contactAdmin: Contact your organization administrator to request the necessary permissions for this feature.

weeklySales.title: SKU Operations and Weekly Sales
weeklySales.description: Review unit economics, inventory coverage, and enter TikTok US sales by day.
weeklySales.searchPlaceholder: Search by SKU or product name...
weeklySales.tableHint: Click Enter sales to open the seven-day entry row. The SKU column stays visible while scrolling.
weeklySales.editCostHint: Click to edit price and costs
weeklySales.unsupportedVariants: Variant entry is not supported yet
weeklySales.pasteHint: Paste seven tab-, comma-, space-, or newline-separated values into Monday.
weeklySales.pasteError: Paste exactly seven non-negative integers into the Monday field.
weeklySales.noRows: No sellable SKUs match these filters
weeklySales.noRowsHint: Clear filters or mark products as active and sellable.
weeklySales.unsavedHint: Saving reconciles the entire week and updates inventory by the difference.
weeklySales.leaveWarning: You have unsaved weekly sales changes. Leave this page and discard them?

variantManager.warning: Warning: Current options would create {count} variants, exceeding the limit of {limit}.
variantManager.reduceValues: Please reduce the number of option values.
variantManager.addOptionsHint: Add options like Size or Color to create product variants

barcodeScanner.title: Scan Barcode
barcodeScanner.notFoundDesc: No product found with this barcode or SKU
barcodeScanner.cameraHint: Point your camera at a barcode to scan

imageUploader.dragDrop: Drag and drop images here, or click to browse
imageUploader.canAddMore: You can only add {count} more image(s)
imageUploader.noImagesHint: No images uploaded yet. The first image will be used as the primary product image.

warehouses.title: Warehouses
warehouses.searchPlaceholder: Search warehouses by name, code, or city...
warehouses.noWarehousesHint: Get started by creating your first warehouse.
warehouses.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

fields.name: Warehouse Name
fields.priorityHint: Higher priority warehouses are used first for fulfillment.

workOrders.title: Work Orders
workOrders.subtitle: Manage assembly production work orders
workOrders.createSubtitle: Start a new production work order for an assembly product
workOrders.noWorkOrdersHint: Get started by creating a new work order for an assembly product.
workOrders.searchPlaceholder: Search by WO number or product name...

components.title: Required Components
components.materialsNeeded: Materials needed to produce {count} unit(s) of {name}
components.noComponents: No components recorded for this work order.
components.noComponentsDefined: This assembly product has no components defined. Add components in the product detail page before creating a work order.
components.insufficientWarning: Some components have insufficient stock. You can still create the work order, but production cannot begin until stock is replenished.

actions.startConfirm: Start production for this work order? Components will be reserved.
actions.completeConfirm: Complete this work order? {count} units will be added to assembly stock.
actions.cancelConfirm: Cancel this work order? Any reserved components will be released.

workOrders.cancelledBanner: This work order has been cancelled.

reportBuilder.title: Custom Reports
reportBuilder.subtitle: Create and manage custom report templates
reportBuilder.createSubtitle: Configure your custom report by selecting data source, columns, and filters
reportBuilder.noReportsDesc: Create your first custom report to get started
reportBuilder.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this report?
reportBuilder.previewHint: Click "Preview Report" to see a sample of the results
reportBuilder.noDataDesc: No data matches the current report configuration. Try adjusting your filters.
